models.name: OpenAI: GPT-Image-2
models.description: OpenAI's next-generation image generation model with image generation and editing support, flexible dimensions, and high-fidelity image inputs.
models.note: ZenMux also lists Google Imagen compatibility for this model, but imagegen-kit intentionally routes OpenAI image models only through the OpenAI Images endpoint.

models.name: OpenAI: GPT-Image-1.5
models.description: OpenAI image generation and editing model focused on instruction following, photorealism, text rendering, and production creative workflows.
models.note: ZenMux also lists Google Imagen compatibility for this model, but imagegen-kit intentionally routes OpenAI image models only through the OpenAI Images endpoint.

models.name: Google: Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview
models.description: Gemini image generation model exposed through the ZenMux Google Gemini generateContent protocol.

models.name: Baidu: ERNIE-Image-Turbo
models.description: Baidu text-to-image model designed for fast generation, strong fidelity, complex instruction following, text rendering, and structured image generation.

models.name: Qwen: Qwen-Image-2.0
models.description: Qwen image generation model available through the ZenMux Google Imagen protocol.

models.name: Qwen: Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro
models.description: Pro variant of Qwen-Image-2.0 available through the ZenMux Google Imagen protocol.

models.name: ByteDance: Doubao-Seedream-5.0-lite
models.description: ByteDance Doubao Seedream image generation model available through the ZenMux Google Imagen protocol.

models.name: Z.AI: GLM-Image
models.description: Z.AI GLM image generation model available through the ZenMux Google Imagen protocol.

models.name: HY-Image-V3.0
models.description: Tencent HY-Image generation model available through the ZenMux Google Imagen protocol.

models.name: KlingAI: Kling-v2
models.description: KlingAI image generation model available through the ZenMux Google Imagen protocol.
